crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

codex_auto_fallback_note: Enabled 2026-05-22 as part of Codex pivot v2 task #4 48h selective-enable window. Low-traffic agent (4h heartbeat-only cron cadence). Revert: set to false. Widening to all Codex-runtime agents requires separate orch approval after 48h monitor window.
